blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot automate native OS file picker dialogs through agent-browser - tool limitation
Test media file (32KB) encodes in under 1 second - cannot observe progress bar updates

appliedUpdates.description: Preload ESM fix verified working - window.electronAPI is now properly exposed
Added note about React UI synchronization issue as critical blocker for user testing
Added note about File.path undefined issue with browser-based file upload

rootCause.description: Two distinct blocking issues prevent full validation: (1) React UI does not re-render when queue state changes via electronAPI - backend processes files correctly but UI stays stale, (2) App crashes when files are added via browser-based upload because File.path is undefined in CDP context
details: React state management bug: electronAPI.addFiles() succeeds at IPC level but React components don't re-render
The onStatusChange event listener in React appears to not receive/sync IPC events properly
Browser-based file upload (used by agent-browser) doesn't provide File.path property which Electron apps expect
Test media files too small (32KB) for timing-dependent assertions
rootCause.suggestedFix: Fix 1: Investigate React state management - likely need to ensure queue state changes trigger re-renders. Fix 2: Use native Electron file dialog (showOpenDialog) instead of browser-based file input. Fix 3: Create larger test media files for timing tests.
